creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 198908
v1

Boost.Signals (v1) hasn't received any updates since Boost 1.63 until upstream dropped it in 1.69 in favor of Boost.Signals2. Let's switch in advance in order to catch regressions early i.e., before bug 232525 lands.

https://www.boost.org/doc/libs/1_68_0/doc/html/signals.html
